notes:
- Create your own typography presets — a new editor (the “+” in Settings → Typography, or Duplicate any preset) lets you set body/title fonts, size, spacing, indentation, alignment, hyphenation, drop cap and more, with a live preview. Custom presets are saved and appear alongside the built-in ones.
- Settings reorganized into “This Project” and “Application” groups, with a new “Language & AI Packs” hub for every downloadable dictionary, language pack and AI model.
